- A new article was added at the top of the "Latest Articles" section: "Daughter of George W. Bush’s Top Intel Official Has Been Hit With Long Prison Sentence for Murder" by Bryan Chai, The Western Journal, dated Mar. 15, 2026, 9:00 pm.
- The rest of the article order remains unchanged, with all previously listed articles still present.
- The new article pushes all subsequent articles down by one position in the list.
